verification_questions.question: Does BackupPayload type include inviteLinks: InviteLink[]?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — added as the last field in the BackupPayload interface

verification_questions.question: Does collectBackupPayload() read all invite links from IDB via loadAllInviteLinks()?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — calls loadAllInviteLinks() and includes the result in the payload

verification_questions.question: Does restoreFromBackup() write invite links back to IDB?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — iterates payload.inviteLinks and calls saveInviteLink() for each

verification_questions.question: Does restoreFromBackup() handle missing inviteLinks field (backwards compat)?
Are PendingJoinRequests NOT included in the backup?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — no reference to joinRequestStorage in backup code, only inviteLinkStorage

verification_questions.question: Do collect and restore round-trip correctly for invite links?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — verified by test 'round-trips invite links through collect and restore'

verification_questions.question: Do all unit tests pass including the new backup invite link tests?
verification_questions.expected: Yes — 23 test files, 314 tests, all passing
